title: Wire ChatKind into ChatMessageEntry.chat_kind and ChatPushConfig.kinds
description: ChatMessageEntry.chat_kind is String but ChatKind enum already handles direct/group/channel with Unknown catch-all. ChatPushConfig.kinds is Option<Vec<String>> filtering on the same set. Fix: change ChatMessageEntry.chat_kind to ChatKind and ChatPushConfig.kinds to Option<Vec<ChatKind>>. ChatKind already has Serialize/Deserialize; no new serde work needed. Update tests that compare chat_kind as a string literal.
notes: Part of epic jmap-chat-tui-hqb: jmap-chat wire up enums — eliminate stringly-typed spec fields
